summary: Test suite covers core functionality well: glob matching (literals, **, *, ?), rule loading, label aggregation, priority ordering, and group conflicts. Good test organization with clear Describe/It blocks and meaningful assertions. However, significant gaps exist: no tests for path separator handling (Windows backslashes), case sensitivity, Unicode in paths, malformed JSON variants, negative/float priorities, empty patterns, or the plaintext file format mentioned in implementation. CLI test spawns subprocesses (good for integration) but only checks label containment, not exact sets or exit codes on success. Edge cases like root-level files with **/ are tested but many boundary conditions missing. Fixture dependency (sample-rules.json) not documented. Would catch major regressions but risks missing subtle bugs in error handling and edge cases.
